{
  "title": "Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's Your 60-Second Fix",
  "meta_description": "Landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99—no sign-up required.",
  "content_outline": [
    "Why Landlords Wrongfully Withhold Security Deposits",
    "What Your Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct",

    "Get Your Deposit Back Without a Lawyer"
  ],
  "key_points": [
    "Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14-30 days with an itemized deduction list",
    "Normal wear and tear, pre-existing damage, and routine cleaning are generally not valid deductions",
    "A formal letter of demand is the fastest, most effective first step before small claims court",
    "Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters in 60 seconds for a one-time $19.99 fee with no subscription"

      "duration": "15-30 sec",
      "visual_note": "Quick cuts with text pop-ups for each invalid deduction"
    },
    {
      "platform": "TikTok / Reels",
      "keyword_focus": "my landlord won't give me my deposit back",
      "hook": "My landlord won't give me my deposit back. Now what?",
      "script": "Step 1: Check your state deadline. Step 2: Demand an itemized list of deductions. Step 3: If they ignore you, hit them with a formal demand letter. Don't hire a lawyer for $500. Do it yourself in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com. $19.99. No subscription. Get your money back.",

    {
      "platform": "TikTok / Reels",
      "keyword_focus": "security deposit not returned",
      "hook": "If your landlord hasn't returned your deposit in 30 days, do this NOW",
      "script": "Every day they hold your money past the deadline, you could be owed double or triple damages depending on your state. Stop waiting. Send a legally binding demand letter in under 60 seconds. $19.99 flat. No sign up. No BS. Deposits-Back.com.",

      "hook": "This letter got my $1,800 security deposit back in 48 hours",
